name: Celestial Flow
description: Smooth, organic color fields that swirl and flow like liquid light, reacting to your cursor.

schema.label: Movement Speed
schema.description: How fast the colors swirl autonomously.

schema.label: Warping Intensity
schema.description: How much the mouse distorts the flow.

schema.label: Softness
schema.description: The blur level for a smooth, flowy aesthetic.
